name: HTML explainer documents end-to-end
objective: Make standalone self-contained HTML explainer documents a first-class KB document type: the document API accepts them, the web app renders them safely with their interactivity (quiz JS) working, search indexes their extracted text, and the MCP read path handles them sanely — alongside existing markdown docs.

review.note: All suites green (backend 70p/13s, web 58t+lint+build, mcp 12p); API-level HTML round-trip E2E all pass; additive contracts, markdown byte-identity, and the opaque-origin sandbox pin held exactly; 8 doc versions consolidated. Residuals non-blocking: pre-existing plugin-parity red gate (P17), live in-browser quiz check = operator visual acceptance.
